title: Ceramic White Heart Fragrance Oil Burner ~ Heart Incense Burner
features: Lovely simple design heart fragrance oil burner
Two large heart perforations allow the light to diffuse through
Heart shape basin in which to place fragranced oils or wax melts
Looks stylish even when not in use
Burner stands approximately 10.5cm high x 9.5cm x 9.5cm
description: Product Description Our White Heart Cutout Oil Burner is the perfect oil burner if you’re looking for a cozy scent in winter and is a simple way to add fragrance to any space. Directions Place a candle inside, add fragranced oils or wax melts to the heart-shaped basin, and light the candle. Safety Warning Avoid direct skin contact with undiluted essential oils. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Ensure proper ventilation during use. Never leave the burning candle unattended. Always extinguish the candle when leaving the room or going to sleep.
